channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Million Depth version 2.0 update now available, adds ‘Dimension Over Mode’ and more
item.content:encoded:
• PC

High-difficulty mode and enhanced weapon crafting.

Publisher PLAYISM and developer Cyber Space Biotope have released the version 2.0 update for deep-diving action strategy game Million Depth, the companies announced. It adds the new high-difficulty “Dimension Over Mode,” as well as enhanced weapon crafting with the introduction of status up tiles.

Here are the full patch notes:

  • New Features
    • Dimension Over Mode
      • New mode: Dimension Over Mode.
        • This new mode is designed for those who’ve cleared the true ending of the game. Here, you will play through the α, β, and γ routes all at once, and your HP and battery carries over between timelines.
        • Spores are ever present here, and the true boss has new, more powerful attacks designed specially for this mode. If the game has felt a little too easy for you, do try out the new mode for a challenge!
        • Dimension Over Mode also supports speedrun records, which we’ll explain further down this post. Once you’ve beaten the true boss again, why not try to improve your playtime record?
      • New attack patterns for the true boss.
    • Speedrunning
      • New features: speedrun timer display and record log.
        • We’ve added speedrun features such as a run timer and records by implementing advice from actual speedrunners of the game. Elite enemy spawn animations can now be skipped, and other skipping functions have been optimized as well. Million Depth was designed to be replayed over and over again even after completing the story, and we hope the addition of speedrunning features will add a new layer of challenge and enjoyment in the form of improving your times.
      • Elite enemy spawn animations are now skippable.
    • Crafting
      • New feature: status up tiles.
        • One of the game’s weaknesses was how players would often fall to the same weapon designs every playthrough.
        • To address this, a new feature has been added: status up tiles. These will encourage players to tweak their designs every run to create differently shaped weapons depending on the placement of tiles, which is random every time.
        • This enhances the puzzle-like gameplay of weapon crafting, as well as making it easier for players to create harder-hitting weapons. You can now save your highest damage count for reference as you experiment. We’ve also received feedback that enemies in the latter half of the game feel too bulky.
        • We’ve made it easier to increase your attack power relatively to enemy toughness. If the original difficulty was already a cake walk for you, don’t worry; the new and more difficult Dimension Over Mode will give you the extra challenge you’ve been waiting for!
      • D-pad support added, smoother controls.
      • Highest damage is now always shown on the screen.
      • Blocks that deal the highest damage are now highlighted in a color that changes depending on attack power.
    • Other
      • New title screen added, can be switched from original screen (post-true ending only).
  • Tweaks and Bug Fixes
    • Combat
      • α Route Ending 3 boss HP tweaked.
      • γ Route Ending 2 boss HP and attack power tweaked.
    • Story
      • Minor dialogue edits.
      • True ending tweaked.
    • Shops
      • Shopkeepers now change moods depending on the value of your trade offer.
    • Controls
      • Game-wide D-pad support added.
    • Combat
      • When your weapon touches an enemy while it has exceeded its maximum combo count, moving the weapon now knocks it back in the direction you dragged in.
    • Menus
      • Reorganized title screen.
      • Added help section to title screen.
    • Other
      • Changed font size.
      • Tweaked skip function.
      • Fixed backgrounds with incorrect placement.
      • Fixed Moma’s glasses sometimes being placed incorrectly.
      • Overall processing speed optimization.
      • Other miscellaneous bug fixes.

Million Depth is available now for PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below.

Version 2.0 Update Trailer

English

Japanese

Traditional Chinese

Simplified Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/million-depth-version-2-0-update-now-available-adds-dimension-over-mode-and-more
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: This Week’s Japanese Game Releases: Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection, Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel P
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

Curse Warrior, DAMON and BABY, Etrange Overlord, etc.

Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC, and Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park are the highlights of this week’s Japanese video game releases.

Other highlights this week include Life is Strange: Reunion for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC, and Winning Post 10 2026 for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC.

Also due out this week are Curse Warrior for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch, and DAMON and BABY and Etrange Overlord for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC.

Get the full list of this week’s Japanese game releases below. It should be noted that Gematsu will receive a small percentage of money from purchases made through Play-Asia links. You can also save five percent with our multi-use “GEMATSU2025” coupon code.

Physical and Digital

  • Curse Warrior (PS5, Switch)
  • Etrange Overlord (Switch) – Launching worldwide.
    • Limited Edition (Switch)
    • North American Version (PS5, Switch)
    • European Version (PS5, Switch)
    • Asian Version (Switch)
  • Diabolik Lovers Lunatic Fate Grand Edition (Switch)
    • Special Edition (Switch)
  • goHELLgo Gou: Tsukiotoshitego (PS4, Switch, PC)
    • Limited Edition (Switch, PC)
  • Handsome Laundering: the mystic lover (Switch)
    • Special Edition (Switch)
    • Asian Version
      • Standard Edition (Switch)
      • Special Edition (Switch)
  • Homicipher (Switch) – Launching digitally worldwide.
  • Kemco RPG Selection Vol. 13 (Switch)
    • Asian Version (Switch)
  • Life is Strange: Reunion (PS5) – Launching worldwide.
    • North American Version (PS5, Xbox Series)
    • European Version (PS5, Xbox Series)
    • Asian Version (PS5)
  • MARVEL Cosmic Invasion (PS5, Switch 2, Switch) – Already available worldwide.
    • Deluxe Edition (PS5, Switch 2, Switch)
  • Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection (PS5, PS4, Switch) – Launching worldwide.
    • North American Version (PS5, Switch)
    • Asian Version (PS5, Switch)
  • Okayu Nyumu! R (Switch)
    • Limited Edition (Switch)
    • Okayu Nyumu! and Okayu Nyumu! R Bundle Set (Switch)
  • Screamer (PS5) – Launching worldwide.
    • North American Version (PS5, Xbox Series)
    • Asian Version (PS5)
  • Sweet Starlight Sisters (Switch)
    • Limited Edition (Switch)
  • Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park (Switch 2)
    • North American Version (Switch 2)
    • European Version (Switch 2)
    • Asian Version (Switch 2)
  • TAITO Milestones 4 (Switch) – Launching worldwide.
    • North American Version (Switch)
    • European Version (Switch)
    • Asian Version (Switch)
  • Until Then (PS5, Switch) – Already available digitally worldwide.
    • Limited Edition (PS5, Switch)
  • Volontes (Switch) – Launching digitally worldwide.
    • Limited Edition (Switch)
  • Winning Post 10 2026 (PS5, Switch 2, Switch) – Game-key card on Switch 2.

Digital-Only

  • Absolum (Xbox Series) – Launching worldwide.
  • Clover Reset (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • Curse Warrior (PS4)
  • DAMON and BABY (PS5, PS4, Switch, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Devil Jam (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch) – Launching worldwide.
  • Disney Dreamlight Valley (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy (iOS, Android) – Launching worldwide.
  • Easy Delivery Co. (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch, iOS, Android) – Launching worldwide.
  • Etrange Overlord (PS5, PS4, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • GRIDbeat! (Switch, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Kena: Bridge of Spirits (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • Life is Strange: Reunion (Xbox Series, PC [Steam, Microsoft Store]) – Launching worldwide.
  • MADO MONOGATARI: Fia and the Wondrous Academy (PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • MARVEL MaXimum Collection (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection (Xbox Series, Xbox One, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • The Midnight Walk (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • New Super Lucky’s Tale (PS5) – Launching worldwide.
    • North American Version (PS5)
    • European Version (PS5)
  • Okayu Nyumu! R (PS4, PC [DMM Games])
  • Project Songbird (PS5, Xbox Series, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Roombattle (PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! (Switch, PC [Steam])
  • Screamer (Xbox Series, PC [Steam, Epic Games Store]) – Launching worldwide.
  • The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin (iOS, Android) – Launching worldwide.
  • SHINONOME ABYSS: The Maiden Exorcist (Switch, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Tales of the Shire: A The Lord of the Rings Game – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • Trash Goblin (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch) – Launching worldwide.
  • Vanishing Starlight (PS5, PC [Steam]) – Launching worldwide.
  • Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage (Switch 2) – Launching worldwide.
  • Winning Post 10 2026 (PS4, PC [Steam])

The PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch titles listed above can be purchased through Japanese PlayStation Network and Nintendo accounts using prepaid cards:

  • PlayStation Store cards (yen): 1,100 / 3,000 / 5,000 / 10,000
  • Nintendo eShop cards (yen): 1,000 / 1,500 / 3,000 / 5,000 / 9,000

Demos, DLC, Updates, etc.

  • Borderlands 4 Downloadable Content “Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned” (PS5, Xbox Series, PC)
  • Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Downloadable Content Character Blue Mary (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, PC)
  • Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.1 Update “Unraveled for Daybreak” (PS5, PC, iOS, Android)
  • Pokemon Trading Card Game Pocket Themed Booster Pack “Mega Shine” (iOS, Android)
  • Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Downloadable Content “Mega Man Pack” (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC)
  • Zenless Zone Zero Version 2.7 Update “Champions Never Fall to the Past” (PS5, Xbox Series, PC, iOS, Android)
